name: Spit Roasted Chili Barbequed Ribs
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a saucepan or skillet over medium-high heat. Cook the onion until soft.
2. Add garlic and cook for an additional minute.
3. Puree the canned tomatoes through a food mill or blender.
4. Combine the pureed tomatoes with the onion mixture, along with red wine, chili powder, cornstarch, granulated sugar, chicken stock, and salt.
5. Bring to a boil and simmer until thickened.
6. Secure ribs on the spit and close the cover two-thirds of the way.
7. Spit roast for 30 minutes, then baste every ten or so for another 40 minutes, or until juices run clear.
8. Place several tablespoons of sauce in each serving plate and serve with ribs. Makes about 4 servings.
